title: CodexPreCommitReview
description: Schema for Codex pre-commit review output. Codex returns this object after reviewing a staged diff against the project's AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md.

verdict.description: APPROVED if no critical findings; REVISE if any critical finding exists.

summary.description: One short paragraph: what the diff does and the overall assessment.

critical.description: Findings that must be addressed before commit. Empty array if none.

line.description: 1-indexed line in the diff or file; null if not localized.

suggested_fix.description: Concrete fix proposal; null if codex isn't sure.

nits.description: Style/suggestion notes. Address only if trivial and clearly improving; otherwise ignore.
